faqs.question: Why are stink bugs so common in Ozone Park homes?
faqs.answer: Stink bugs seek warm shelter as temperatures drop, making Ozone Park's residential areas ideal targets in fall and winter. They enter through small cracks around windows, doors, and siding, often congregating in attics and wall voids. Our treatment includes sealing entry points and eliminating existing populations.
